attributes.title: SQL Injection in user login
attributes.description: User-supplied input is concatenated directly into SQL query without sanitization.
attributes.mitigation: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

attributes.title: Remote Code Execution via deserialization
attributes.description: Untrusted data is deserialized without validation allowing arbitrary code execution.
attributes.mitigation: Use YAML.safe_load instead of YAML.load. Never deserialize untrusted data with YAML.load or Marshal.load.
attributes.single_line_code:
require 'yaml'
require 'json'

class DataImporter
  def initialize(format: :json)
    @format = format
  end

  def import(raw_data)
    case @format
    when :yaml
      # VULNERABLE: YAML.load allows arbitrary object instantiation
      data = YAML.load(raw_data)
    when :json
      data = JSON.parse(raw_data, symbolize_names: true)
    end
    process(data)
  end

  def process(data)
    data.each { |record| save_record(record) }
  end
end

attributes.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in search results
attributes.description: User input rendered directly to DOM without escaping.
attributes.mitigation: Replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML with safe text rendering. Use DOMPurify if HTML must be rendered.

attributes.title: Exposed AWS credentials in environment
attributes.description: AWS access keys committed to repository.
attributes.mitigation: Rotate all exposed credentials immediately. Use AWS Secrets Manager or environment injection at deploy time. Add .env.production to .gitignore.
attributes.single_line_code:
# Production Environment Configuration
NODE_ENV=production
PORT=3000
HOST=0.0.0.0

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://admin:s3cr3t@db.prod.internal:5432/appdb

# AWS — VULNERABLE: secrets committed to repository
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1
AWS_S3_BUCKET=prod-assets-bucket

# Stripe
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_example_REDACTED

# Auth
JWT_SECRET=hardcoded-jwt-secret-do-not-ship

# Redis
REDIS_URL=redis://cache.prod.internal:6379

attributes.title: Missing CSRF protection on API endpoint
attributes.description: API endpoint modifies state but lacks CSRF token validation.
attributes.mitigation: Add CSRF token validation using Flask-WTF or a custom middleware. Verify the Origin and Referer headers as a secondary check.
